checks.description: The output preserves draft, signed, and post-approval correction pages as distinct states for CO-1184.
The final state is approved with owner correction, final window 2026-08-13 02:00-04:00, and final rollback owner Omar Nadir.
Supporting details are preserved: affected services on draft page, approved execution checklist on signed page, and correction log showing Omar accepted ownership at 2026-08-08 09:15.
